i=s.deltaTime,n=this.prevScrollX,o=this.prevScrollY,r=this.scrollX,l=this.scrollY,a=n-r,c=o-l;this.prevScrollX=r,this.prevScrollY=l,a&&(this.backwardX=n>r),c&&(this.backwardY=o>l),this.velocity=W(i>0?Math.sqrt(a*a+c*c)/i:0,5)}}).init(),this.resizeTicker=new Me({autoplay:!1,duration:250*B.timeScale,onComplete:()=>{this.updateWindowBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll()}}).init(),this.wakeTicker=new Me({autoplay:!1,duration:500*B.timeScale,onBegin:()=>{this.scrollTicker.resume()},onComplete:()=>{this.scrollTicker.pause()}}).init(),this._head=null,this._tail=null,this.updateScrollCoords(),this.updateWindowBounds(),this.updateBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll(),this.resizeObserver=new ResizeObserver(()=>this.resizeTicker.restart()),this.resizeObserver.observe(this.element),(this.useWin?Qe:this.element).addEventListener("scroll",this,!1)}updateScrollCoords(){let e=this.useWin,s=this.element;this.scrollX=W(e?Qe.scrollX:s.scrollLeft,0),this.scrollY=W(e?Qe.scrollY:s.scrollTop,0)}updateWindowBounds(){this.winWidth=Qe.innerWidth,this.winHeight=kr()}updateBounds(){let e=getComputedStyle(this.element),s=this.element;this.scrollWidth=s.scrollWidth+parseFloat(e.marginLeft)+parseFloat(e.marginRight),this.scrollHeight=s.scrollHeight+parseFloat(e.marginTop)+parseFloat(e.marginBottom),this.updateWindowBounds();let i,n;if(this.useWin)i=this.winWidth,n=this.winHeight;else{let o=s.getBoundingClientRect();i=s.clientWidth,n=s.clientHeight,this.top=o.top,this.left=o.left,this.scale=o.width?i/o.width:o.height?n/o.height:1}this.width=i,this.height=n}refreshScrollObservers(){X(this,e=>{e._debug&&e.removeDebug()}),this.updateBounds(),X(this,e=>{e.refresh(),e.onResize(e),e._debug&&e.debug()})}refresh(){this.updateWindowBounds(),this.updateBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll()}handleScroll(){this.updateScrollCoords(),this.wakeTicker.restart()}handleEvent(e){e.type==="scroll"&&this.handleScroll()}revert(){this.scrollTicker.cancel(),this.dataTimer.cancel(),this.resizeTicker.cancel(),this.wakeTicker.cancel(),this.resizeObserver.disconnect(),(this.useWin?Qe:this.element).removeEventListener("scroll",this),Ys.delete(this.element)}},Dr=t=>{let speed(e){this._speed=+e,this.forEach(s=>s.playbackRate=e)}get currentTime(){let e=this.controlAnimation,s=B.timeScale;return this.completed?this.duration:e?+e.currentTime*(s===1?1:s):0}set currentTime(e){let s=e*(B.timeScale===1?1:He);this.forEach(i=>{!this.persist&&s>=this.duration&&i.play(),i.currentTime=s})}get progress(){return this.currentTime/this.duration}set progress(e){this.forEach(s=>s.currentTime=e*this.duration||0)}resume(){return this.paused?(this.paused=!1,this.forEach("play")):this}pause(){return this.paused?this:(this.paused=!0,this.forEach("pause"))}alternate(){return this.reversed=!this.reversed,this.forEach("reverse"),this.paused&&this.forEach("pause"),this}play(){return this.reversed&&this.alternate(),this.resume()}reverse(){return this.reversed||this.alternate(),this.resume()}seek(e,s=!1){return s&&(this.muteCallbacks=!0),e<this.duration&&(this.completed=!1),this.currentTime=e,this.muteCallbacks=!1,this.paused&&this.pause(),this}restart(){return this.completed=!1,this.seek(0,!0).resume()}commitStyles(){return this.forEach("commitStyles")}complete(){return this.seek(this.duration)}cancel(){return this.muteCallbacks=!0,this.commitStyles().forEach("cancel"),this.animations.length=0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.targets.forEach(e=>{e.style.transform==="none"&&e.style.removeProperty("transform")})}),this}revert(){return r=n[o];v(r)||r===Ee?i.removeProperty(Ut(o)):e.style[o]=r}e.getAttribute("style")===Ee&&e.removeAttribute("style")}),this}then(e=H){let s=this.then,i=()=>{this.then=null,e(this),this.then=s,this._resolve=H};return new Promise(n=>(this._resolve=()=>n(i()),this.completed&&this._resolve(),this))}},uo={animate:(t,e)=>new Hi(t,e),convertEase:Gs};var Vr=0,Br=0,Ks=(t,e)=>!t||!e?!1:t===e||t.contains(e),Jt=t=>{if(!t)return null;let e=t.style,s=e.transition||"";return
